name: ZNF_cluster_19q13_4
description: Krüppel-associated box (KRAB) zinc-finger gene cluster on chromosome 19q13.31-q13.43, containing >200 ZNF genes (the largest ZNF gene cluster in the human genome). Many ZNFs share near-identical KRAB domains and modular C2H2 zinc-finger arrays, generating high paralog-level homology that breaks unique mapping.

architecture.internal_structure: Dense clustering of KRAB-ZNF genes; tandemly arranged ZNF families share ~80-95% identity over coding regions; rapidly evolving family with primate-specific expansions; embedded in SD-rich chromosomal region.
